channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-02-27 13:55 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Based on my research, more than 5,700 commercial aircraft either already have SpaceX’s@Starlinkinsta...
item.description: Based on my research, more than 5,700 commercial aircraft either already have SpaceX’s@Starlinkinstalled or are under contract to receive it. That would account for ~19% of the active global commercial aircraft fleet when all installs are completed. SpaceX has already gotten two of the top four largest U.S. airlines to adopt Starlink (United and Southwest). List of airlines/operators that have publicly announced Starlink internet adoption for their fleet: • Southwest Airlines • United Airlines • British Airways • Emirates • Qatar Airlines • Air France • Hawaiian Airlines • Alaska Airlines • Virgin Atlantic • Lufthansa • Korean air • Air Baltic • Aer Lingus • Air Busan • Air Dolomiti • Air New Zealand • Air Seoul • Asiana Airlines • Austrian Airlines • Swiss Airlines • Scandinavian Airlines • Gulf Air • Iberia • Discover Airlines • flydubai • ITA Airways • Vueling • Brussels Airlines • Jin Air • LEVEL • WestJet • Edelweiss Air • JSX • ZipAir • Eurowings And all this doesn't even include business jets. More than 1,000 business jets are currently equipped with Starlink, representing more than 50% of all active tails. Starlink's aviation division is and will no doubt continue to see massive growth.

item.title: @elonmusk: Starship V3 SN1 headed for ground tests. I am highly confident that the V3 design will achieve full ...
item.description: Starship V3 SN1 headed for ground tests. I am highly confident that the V3 design will achieve full reusability.

item.title: @elonmusk: Should note that SpaceX will only try to catch the ship with the tower after two perfect soft landin...
item.description: Should note that SpaceX will only try to catch the ship with the tower after two perfect soft landings in the ocean. The risk of the ship breaking up over land needs to be very low.

item.title: @elonmusk: The Moon fundamentally changes the game for manned space exploration. It is a next-level proving gro...
item.description: The Moon fundamentally changes the game for manned space exploration. It is a next-level proving ground where astronauts can build habitats, harvest propellant and minerals from the lunar surface, and learn the skills necessary to go onto Mars.

item.title: @elonmusk: Those who pushed this evil will pay dearly
item.description: Those who pushed this evil will pay dearly

item.title: @elonmusk: You’d think someone would at least check to see if there is something wrong with water 🙄
item.description: You’d think someone would at least check to see if there is something wrong with water 🙄

item.title: @elonmusk: Turn your imagination into motion on Grok. How? Prompt: A mysterious beautiful woman sits calmly on ...
item.description: Turn your imagination into motion on Grok. How? Prompt: A mysterious beautiful woman sits calmly on a throne made of stars floating in deep space. Galaxies slowly swirl around her like a crown and her dress is made of nebula fabric that gently moves like cosmic smoke. Soft glowing cosmic rim light illuminates her face and detailed realistic skin texture is visible. After a moment she slowly rises from the throne and begins a graceful slow ballet movement in zero gravity. As she stands, the star throne dissolves into thousands of glowing particles and orbiting lights. She performs a soft elegant spin and extends her arms, and her motion causes surrounding galaxies and stardust to follow her movement as if she controls gravity. Her hair flows naturally in weightlessness. No fast dancing — slow, serene ballet, quiet power. The background is deep black space with colorful nebulae and distant suns. Cinematic camera with a slow floating push-in at the beginning, then a gentle orbit around her during the ballet spin, shallow depth of field, smooth motion, no shaking. Scene timing: 0-3 seconds she sits on the star throne with galaxies slowly moving, 3-6 seconds she stands and the throne dissolves into particles, 6-10 seconds she performs a slow ballet spin in zero gravity while galaxies react to her motion. Her movements subtly bend space around her as gravity responds to her presence. Realistic physics, volumetric particles, detailed fabric simulation, no distortion, no extra limbs, no flickering. 4K cinematic quality, 24fps film look, slow motion, calm graceful movement like underwater.

item.title: @elonmusk: I had the pleasure to speak with Elon last week on the future of Giga Berlin. Great conversation!
item.description: I had the pleasure to speak with Elon last week on the future of Giga Berlin. Great conversation!

item.title: @elonmusk: @grokexplain Block business model like I'm a 90 yo illiterate grandma from Sicilia who runs a pizzer...
item.description: @grokexplain Block business model like I'm a 90 yo illiterate grandma from Sicilia who runs a pizzeria

item.title: @elonmusk: Now imagine if they actually reported all of them instead of the authorities joining in.
item.description: Now imagine if they actually reported all of them instead of the authorities joining in.

item.title: @elonmusk: Just stood 10 meters (~33 feet) from Starship today in Boca Chica. Heat tiles, flaps, the full stain...
item.description: Just stood 10 meters (~33 feet) from Starship today in Boca Chica. Heat tiles, flaps, the full stainless steel monster towering right there — insanely close. No other place on Earth lets the public get this close to real, operational spacecraft. Elon’s companies just do things differently. Open. Bold. Accessible. This is how you inspire the world — and especially the next generation. 🚀

item.title: @elonmusk: They are legalising the rape of europes women
item.description: They are legalising the rape of europes women

item.title: @elonmusk: 'Tesla and SpaceX are the 2 most exciting companies in the world'@elonmuskYep, and that's why I'm th...
item.description: 'Tesla and SpaceX are the 2 most exciting companies in the world'@elonmuskYep, and that's why I'm thrilled to spend a very significant amount of time, on a daily basis, studying their progress to push humanity forward. Much more than just an investment with potentially huge rewards, it's first and foremost a source of intellectual thrill. The Tesla model, and everything Elon Musk is trying to accomplish, isn't easy to grasp, and it's clearly not the superficial, sloppy, and biased work of these incompetent journalists that's unfortunately going to open the public's eyes. That's a shame... what a pity!

item.title: @elonmusk: The first Starship V3 has left the build site to begin prelaunch testing
item.description: The first Starship V3 has left the build site to begin prelaunch testing

item.description: 🚨🇬🇧 “Migrant Murderer plunges Knife into 9-year-old Girl” How many more innocent Children must die?

item.title: @elonmusk: STARSHIP V3 – THE BIGGEST UPGRADE YET has left the build site for prelaunch testing. Flight 12 is ab...
item.description: STARSHIP V3 – THE BIGGEST UPGRADE YET has left the build site for prelaunch testing. Flight 12 is about to change everything Here’s what’s new: - Raptor 3 engines: 51% more thrust, lighter, simpler design (33 on booster, 6 on Ship) - Full stack ~1.5 m taller for hundreds more tons of propellant capacity - 3 grid fins (instead of 4), 50% larger, with integrated catch pins - Redesigned fuel transfer tube on Super Heavy - Fully reusable hot-stage interstage - Cleaner, denser heat shield design - First launch from upgraded Pad 2 This is the version built for orbital flights, propellant transfer, and the road to Mars
